info.name: Microsoft Azure DeviceServices
info.description: Use this API to manage the Windows IoT device services in your Azure subscription.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Windowsiot Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available Windows IoT Services REST API operations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Windowsiot Deviceservices Devicename

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group that contains the Windows IoT Device Service.
(Required) The name of the Windows IoT Device Service.

request.description: Get the non-security related metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Create Or Update The Metadata Of A Windows Iot Device Service

header.description: ETag of the Windows IoT Device Service. Do not specify for creating a new Windows IoT Device Service. Required to update an existing Windows IoT Device Service.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group that contains the Windows IoT Device Service.
(Required) The name of the Windows IoT Device Service.

request.description: Create or update the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the Windows IoT Device Service metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the Windows IoT Device Service.

header.description: ETag of the Windows IoT Device Service. Do not specify for creating a new Windows IoT Device Service. Required to update an existing Windows IoT Device Service.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Updates The Metadata Of A Windows Iot Device Service

header.description: ETag of the Windows IoT Device Service. Do not specify for creating a brand new Windows IoT Device Service. Required to update an existing Windows IoT Device Service.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group that contains the Windows IoT Device Service.
(Required) The name of the Windows IoT Device Service.

request.description: Updates the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the Windows IoT Device Service metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the Windows IoT Device Service.

header.description: ETag of the Windows IoT Device Service. Do not specify for creating a brand new Windows IoT Device Service. Required to update an existing Windows IoT Device Service.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
